items.title: Dennis Schröder says OKC is the biggest hackers in the league:
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
Dennis Schröder says OKC is the biggest hackers in the league:

“The whole team, it’s crazy how they don’t get calls like that because they play like that all season, and yeah they hacking for sure.”

(via NBA Courtside)
#NBA
